name: lightroom-mcp
description: Bridge Claude to Adobe Lightroom Classic — search, organize, develop, export.
long_description: Connects Claude to a running Adobe Lightroom Classic instance via a bundled Lua plugin. Tools cover catalog search, collections, ratings, keywords, develop presets and settings, import and export. The Lightroom plugin is auto-installed into Lightroom's Modules folder on first run; restart Lightroom once after install to load it.

tools.name: search_photos
tools.description: Search the catalog by filename, keywords, rating, or date.

tools.name: get_selected_photos
tools.description: Photos currently selected in Lightroom (or the filmstrip).

tools.name: get_photo_metadata
tools.description: Detailed EXIF + develop metadata for a photo.

tools.name: list_collections
tools.description: List all collections and collection sets.

tools.name: add_to_collection
tools.description: Add photos to an existing collection.

tools.name: set_keywords
tools.description: Add or remove keywords on photos.

tools.name: apply_develop_preset
tools.description: Apply a Develop preset to photos.

tools.name: copy_develop_settings
tools.description: Copy Develop settings from one photo to others.

tools.name: set_develop_settings
tools.description: Set Develop settings directly on a photo.

request_port.title: Plugin request port
request_port.description: TCP port the Lightroom plugin listens on for requests. Must match the Plug-in Manager setting.

response_port.title: Plugin response port
response_port.description: TCP port the Lightroom plugin sends responses on. Must match the Plug-in Manager setting.
